choices.text: Metal plate (Steelmaster/Cryptosteel) stored offline + redundant geographic locations. Never digital photo, email, or cloud — phishing/breach risk. Test recovery on wiped device before scaling deposits.

Multisig 2-of-3 across hardware wallets in different locations. Lose any one, recover. Eliminates single-point failure. Sparrow / Specter / Casa / Unchained for implementation. Inheritance plan via attorney with key location info.
